{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Benson's throne
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's throne]] is a huge block of stone at the far end of the room.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
